Manohar Intl Airport (Mopa/GOX)

Operational

Primarily domestic; intl routes shifted to Mopa

Mormugao Port Authority (MPA)
65 MTPA; Berths 10&11 commissioned Jan 2025
Operational

Operational

Operational

Operational
